breaking.text: Broadcom reports fiscal Q1 earnings after the bell — analysts expect $2.03 EPS on $19.18B revenue
Coinbase surges 14.6% after Trump signals support for digital asset market bill
Trump backs crypto firms against banks on stablecoin yields, Coinbase surges 14%
Broadcom, Veeva Systems, Okta report after-hours earnings — Broadcom analysts expect $2.03 EPS on $19.18B revenue

summary: The S&P 500 rallied 0.78% to 6,869.50 on Wednesday as markets staged a broad recovery from Monday's geopolitical selloff, driven by easing oil prices and stronger-than-expected economic data. ADP private payrolls beat expectations at 63,000 vs. 50,000 forecast, while ISM Services PMI came in at 53.5 with slowing prices paid, easing inflation fears. Tech led the advance with Micron and AMD each jumping 5%+, crypto stocks surged on Trump's digital asset bill support (Coinbase +14.6%, MicroStrategy +10.4%), and consumer discretionary had its best day since October behind Ross Stores (+7%). The Fed's Beige Book showed mixed growth across districts, and attention now shifts to Broadcom's after-hours earnings report.

highlights.text: CoreWeave jumps 8% on multiyear agreement with Perplexity; BofA initiates Tesla at Buy with $460 target
Consumer discretionary sector pops 2% for best day since Oct 31 — Ross Stores +7%, Amazon/Tesla/Airbnb all +3%
GitLab tumbles 8% premarket on disappointing FY revenue guidance of $1.10-1.12B vs $1.12B expected
Fed Beige Book shows 7 districts with slight-to-moderate growth, but 5 districts reported flat or declining activity
ADP private payrolls beat at 63K vs 50K expected; ISM Services PMI solid at 53.5 with cooling prices paid component
Crypto stocks explode higher — Coinbase +14.6%, MicroStrategy +10.4%, Robinhood +8.1% — after Trump signals support for digital asset legislation
South Korea's Kospi plunges over 12% amid escalating Middle East war fears, worst day in decades
Micron and AMD each jump 5%+; Amazon gains 3.3% as chip and consumer discretionary sectors lead
Fed Beige Book shows mixed picture: 7 districts with slight-to-moderate growth but 5 districts flat or declining
Coinbase surges 14% as Bitcoin recovers to $73,092; Trump publicly backs crypto firms against banks on stablecoin regulation
ADP private payrolls beat at 63K vs 50K est.; ISM Services PMI steady at 53.5 with cooling prices-paid component
S&P 500 rises 0.8% to 6,869.50 as tech rebound and easing oil prices lift Wall Street
